caption: A robotic figure with a white head, red horns, and a blue business suit sits at a desk against a yellow background. The robot is multi-armed, simultaneously holding a telephone to its ear, a piece of paper, and a tablet, while working on a laptop. Speech bubbles above its head display the words "BUY" and "SELL". The "COINTELEGRAPH" logo appears in the upper right corner of the scene. To the right of the robot, a circular graphic evolves across the sequence. It begins as a white starburst, transitions into a clock face with a ticking hand, and finally transforms into a clock containing the text "24/7". The robot remains in a static pose throughout the sequence, while the graphic to its right animates to emphasize the concept of continuous, around-the-clock trading.
